Digitális képkeret KODAK RCF-1012W Burlywood:
	

	
	
	
	The Kodak RCF-1012W digital photo frame displays your memories on a 10.2-inch display with a resolution of 1280 × 800 px. With internal memory of 32 GB, it can hold a large number of photos and videos. Easily upload images and videos to the frame using SD, micro SD, micro SDHC or MMC memory cards.
